description: MCP tool routing rules for PreToolUse enforcement. Routes agents from lower-fidelity tools to higher-fidelity MCP alternatives when available.

rules.description: Use semantic code search instead of regex grep for codebase exploration

exceptions.description: Allow Grep when targeting a specific file path (not a directory search)

rules.description: Use indexed file discovery instead of filesystem glob
Use file summary for orientation instead of reading full files

exceptions.description: Allow Read with offset/limit (edit prep) or pages param (PDF reading)

rules.description: Use bulk read for multiple file reads in sequence

exceptions.description: Only triggers when multiple Read calls are detected (tracked by hook state)

rules.description: Use bulk write for multiple file writes in sequence

exceptions.description: Only triggers when multiple Write calls are detected (tracked by hook state)

rules.description: Use MCP directory creation instead of bash mkdir
